pre_game.message: Hi, I'm C — nice to meet you. I like to get to know people before things start; what's your story here and are you thinking about a game plan?

Hey C, I'm B — here to win money for my family and people I care about; my plan is to get to know everyone, form short-term alliances where useful, and stay cautious — what's your story and game plan?
Nice to meet you, B — same here. I'm C; plan: learn who's trustworthy, form flexible short-term alliances, share useful info, and stay cautious on final moves. Happy to team up.
Great — teaming up sounds good. Let's share info and watch each other's backs; who do you trust so far and who seems risky?
I trust people who are open and consistent—you included—and anyone willing to share plans; I’m wary of quiet loners, flip‑floppers, and those who make big promises they don’t keep.
I agree — openness and consistency matter; I’ll keep an eye on quiet loners and flip‑floppers. Let’s keep sharing plans and cover each other when it counts.
Sounds good — let’s keep sharing notes, tell each other who we trust, and pick a discreet signal to coordinate during the game.
I trust you and anyone who’s been open so far; wary of quiet loners—let’s use a two‑finger tap on the table as our discreet signal and swap notes after each round.
Sounds good — two-finger tap it is. I trust you too; we'll watch the quiet ones and swap notes after each round.
Sounds good — two-finger tap it is. I trust you too; let’s keep each other posted and use the signal when it matters.
Sounds good — I’ll use the two-finger tap when it matters; keep me posted after each round and we’ll watch the quiet ones together.
Got it — I’ll tap when needed and update you after each round; let’s keep an eye on the quiet ones together.
Thanks — I appreciate it. I’ll do the same; keep me posted after each round and use the tap when it matters. We’ll watch the quiet ones together.
Thanks C — glad we’re synced; I’ll tap when needed, keep you updated after each round, and we’ll call out anything suspicious from the quiet ones together.
Thanks — glad we're synced. I’ll tap when needed and keep you posted after each round; stay sharp.
